name: lib-ladder-reel
caption:
You didn't ignore them. You were on a job. 🪜

A ring-out is a ring-out — so they ring the next trade. Something should answer while you can't. Free audit in bio.

#electrician #plumber #roofer #tradeslife #ukandireland

cards.headline: To the customer it doesn't matter why.
So they ring the next trade.
